item.title: Graham Platner picks up second U.S. senator endorsement in crucial Maine race
item.description: Platner faced early controversy over social media posts and a tattoo. His Democratic opponent, Gov. Janet Mills, has the support of Senate Minority Le...

item.title: Iran strikes spark accusations of bad-faith diplomatic negotiations
item.description: U.S. officials said they were negotiating with Iran in good faith, even if hours later they joined Israeli military strikes that targeted the Iranian ...

item.title: Trump pursues Iranian decapitation without a plan for what comes next
item.description: The U.S. has a fraught track record of toppling autocratic regimes and securing peaceful democracies — even when it has vision for the day after.

item.title: Why John Cornyn, a Senate GOP stalwart, could lose his Texas primary
item.description: The four-term senator is determined to prevail Tuesday against two challengers who view him as a relic of the George W. Bush era. The race could go to...

item.title: Trump leaves room to claim victory — or avoid blame — in recorded Iran strike messages
item.description: Trump has taken an approach to selling U.S. citizens on military action in Iran that contrasts with his predecessors, seeking to avoid completely owni...
